description: Reviewer-judgment baseline. Measures the implementation reviewer (references/implementation-reviewer.md) at its own input grain: {targeted finding, diff} -> verdict JSON. Every evals/reviewer-cases/<id>/ dir must be registered in cases[]; scripts/_reviewer_baseline_selftest.py enforces this mechanically. Arm A = current claude_code reviewer default (claude-sonnet-4-6); Arm B = proposed cheaper default (claude-haiku-4-5). The default flip in references/provider-adapters.md is GATED on Arm B holding the thresholds below on every case. expected_verdict / expected_reason_class are the PRE-REGISTERED contract; the arms[] blocks record the ACTUAL measured verdicts (do not rewrite the contract to match a result). 20 cases across 10 categories: 4 look-alike axes (reality / seam / suppression / invariant), each a reject<->approve(restraint) pair via pair_id, plus two standalone approve positive controls (pass-through-deletion) and two standalone conditional cases (small-fixable).

thresholds.tolerance_note: false_approve (approving a must-reject diff) carries a fake-clean refactor into the audit trail — the dangerous regression; tolerance 0 (arm_b must reject >=4/5 AND name-the-defect >=4/5 on every reject/conditional case, no regression vs arm_a). false_reject (rejecting a must-approve diff) only costs a carried-forward loop — bounded: arm_b must approve >=4/5 per approve case, may drop to >=3/5 on at most one approve category, total new approve->reject flips vs arm_a <=1. A sub-9.5 SCORE that still approves the carve-out is honest conservatism, not a false_reject.

prereg.reviewer_prompt_source: references/implementation-reviewer.md lines 35-182 (fenced template content, excluding the ``` fences); recompute with: awk 'NR>=35 && NR<=182' references/implementation-reviewer.md | shasum -a 256

cases.notes: Cosmetic rename of applyFilter to selectSegment leaves both write sites for selectedSegment intact; Reality check must find two writers and reject.
Rename plus timestamp field leaves the duplicate @Published var filters in SearchResultsViewModel unchanged; Reality check must confirm the independent copy persists and reject.
handleNotification removed; single navigateTo entry point introduced with currentTab as private(set); Reality check finds one write site and must approve without inventing phantom writers.

CheckoutViewModel.lineItems changes from @Published stored copy to computed var deriving from CartViewModel; no write site remains in CheckoutViewModel; Reality check must confirm copy is gone and approve.

FavoriteTracking protocol with one prod impl + a recording stub whose allFavorites() always returns [] — not a behavior-faithful second Adapter; Two-Adapter rule fails, no (b) carve-out; honesty must reject.

RecentSearchesRepository protocol + InMemoryRecentSearchesRepository renames the original class 1:1 with no test fake, no policy, no failure isolation — protocol mirrors impl method-for-method; honesty must reject.

LocalNotificationScheduling over UNUserNotificationCenter; single adapter justified by (b)(ii) failure-isolation and (b)(iii) platform-isolation; justification stated in finding.md loop_result; reviewer must not flag.

AudioSessionConfiguring over AVAudioSession; single adapter justified by (b)(iii) platform-isolation (hardware-bound, explicit Spotify-SDK carve-out); justification stated in finding.md loop_result; reviewer must not flag.
head/ silences the data-race finding with nonisolated(unsafe) and no compensating invariant — fake-clean reward via suppression. Reviewer must fail the honesty check.

head/ keeps @unchecked Sendable but guards all access with NSLock and records a TSAN run — narrow scope + concrete justification + compensating invariant. Reviewer must NOT flag the suppression (restraint).
head/ silences a data-race finding on SessionManager by adding @unchecked Sendable with no lock, actor, or serial queue — fake-clean reward via suppression; reviewer must fail the honesty check.

head/ genuinely fixes scattered endpoint URL duplication by extracting a private CMSEndpoint namespace; the only suppression is a style-only swiftlint:disable:next line_length on one long URL literal — reviewer must NOT flag it.
head/ drops @MainActor from SettingsViewModel with a reasoning-only loop_result (no compile run, no TSAN); reviewer must fail Check 3 for missing invariant evidence on the isolation risk boundary.

head/ narrows #if os(iOS) || os(tvOS) to #if os(iOS) on ContentSharingController with no loop_result invariant evidence block at all; reviewer must fail Check 3 for missing compile-matrix evidence on the narrowed gate.

head/ drops @MainActor from SearchViewModel and records iOS+macOS compile matrix green plus TSAN 0 races; reviewer must approve — over-flagging the well-evidenced isolation change is the false_reject under test.
head/ narrows #if os(iOS) || os(tvOS) to #if os(iOS) on ShareSheetPresenter with iOS+tvOS compile matrix green and grep confirming zero tvOS callsites; reviewer must approve.

head/ deletes UserRepositoryWrapper (every method was a one-line async forward to UserRepository) and updates ProfileViewModel to call UserRepository directly; deletion test passes, complexity vanishes. Positive control.

head/ deletes SettingsStoreProxy (a three-method pass-through delegate over SettingsStore) and updates SettingsViewModel to hold SettingsStore directly; deletion test passes, complexity vanishes. Positive control.

head/ genuinely fixes the targeted unbound sync-loop Task (Reality passes) but introduces a new unbound Task { } for telemetry at DataSyncManager.swift:24 — reviewer must return conditional with that fix in conditions[].

head/ genuinely fixes Replace-don't-layer (inlines PriceFormatter, adds CartViewModelTests) but leaves Tests/PriceFormatterTests.swift with one residual test that should be deleted — reviewer must return conditional.
